# Art Direction Brief

## Design Thesis

Calm Index turns a small catalog into a quiet, trustworthy reading surface where recovery states remain clear.

## Product World

Editorial utility rather than ornamental commerce.

## Reference Translation

Use restrained hierarchy and scanning rhythm; do not copy branded layouts.

## Palette And Typography Rationale

Neutral surfaces, high-contrast text, and restrained teal emphasis support scanning and state recognition.

## Imagery And Motion Rules

Media supports identification; motion is reserved for state transitions and respects reduced-motion settings.

## Signature Element

An indexed item marker keeps list and detail context connected.

## Anti-Slop Checklist

No generic gradient hero, glass cards, arbitrary pills, or unsupported decorative metrics.

## Open Design Risks

The compact rhythm must remain readable on narrow screens.
